name: Posy
description: Six-petaled posies pressed flat across the page — every redraw spins each flower and trades its petals for a new ink.

code.style: --spin: @rand(60deg); --rule: ( /* all six petals share one emitted ink and one ring radius */ --pet: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color5)); --pr: calc(@r(260, 320) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { transform: rotate(var(--spin)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 22%; left: 39%; top: 39%; border-radius: 50%; background: @var(--pet); box-shadow: @var(--pr) 0 @var(--pet), calc(@var(--pr) / 2) calc(@var(--pr) * 0.87) @var(--pet), calc(@var(--pr) / -2) calc(@var(--pr) * 0.87) @var(--pet), calc(@var(--pr) * -1) 0 @var(--pet), calc(@var(--pr) / -2) calc(@var(--pr) * -0.87) @var(--pet), calc(@var(--pr) / 2) calc(@var(--pr) * -0.87) @var(--pet); transition: ease 600ms; } :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 18%; left: 41%; top: 41%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color4); z-index: 1; transition: ease 600ms; } } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
